audit_items.proof_trace: Both _getAssetPrice (lines 396-400) and transmit (lines 168-172) apply identical scaling formulas: dec<PRICE_DECIMALS → multiply by 10**(PRICE_DECIMALS-dec), dec>PRICE_DECIMALS → divide by 10**(dec-PRICE_DECIMALS). The direction and exponent formula are structurally the same, both normalizing to 18 decimals.
